name: Conspiracy Pack
white: The government drone that has been pretending to be a pigeon outside my window all week.
Birds, which have never been real.
The moon landing set, now available for children's birthday parties.
A flat Earth with edges you can dangle your feet off.
Lizard people who are bad at blinking.
The Illuminati's group chat.
Chemtrails that smell like Axe body spray.
A tin foil hat in a flattering matte finish.
Bigfoot's ironclad NDA.
The intern who draws the crop circles.
Area 51's suggestion box.
Whatever the fluoride is doing to the frogs.
A 5G tower that moans.
The deep state's casual Friday.
A red string corkboard connecting all my exes to the Freemasons.
The pigeons' quarterly battery-swap meeting.
Big Pharma's edibles division.
The microchip in my ass that only picks up smooth jazz.
Waking the sheeple gently, with a kiss on the forehead.
The thing chained up in the Denver Airport basement.
The demonic airport horse statue that knows what I did.
A false-flag operation carried out entirely by geese.
The Loch Ness Monster's OnlyFans.
Reptilian shapeshifters at the DMV.
The government agent in a bird costume assigned to my case.
An alien probe with a heated setting.
Getting probed and finishing embarrassingly fast.
The Bermuda Triangle's timeshare presentation.
Hollow Earth, and the swingers who live down there.
Bigfoot erotica, in hardcover.
The Illuminati's mandatory potluck.
The government's weather machine, stuck on drizzle.
Faking the moon landing but not my orgasms.
The government's file on my browser history.
Chemtrails spelling out "WASH ME."
A Man in Black who just wants to talk about his divorce.
Aliens building the pyramids and then ghosting us.
The guy at Area 51 who runs the lost-and-found.
A UFO that only abducts bottoms.
My toaster, which is wearing a wire.
The New World Order's onboarding paperwork.
A secret society that meets in an Applebee's parking lot.
The satanic message hidden in the ice cream truck song.
Government snow that won't melt, no matter how long you hold the lighter.
The moon, which is a hologram, and a liar.
Finland, which does not exist.
The tinfoil hat that actually works, which is how I found out about the orgies.
The Illuminati's annual blood orgy, which is BYOB.
A flat-Earther slowly backing away from the edge.
The microchip they hid in the free ketchup.
Big Fluoride.
A garage inventor one magnet away from infinite energy.
The water-powered car your uncle swears he drove in 1987.
The one frame of moon footage where you can see the boom mic.
Atlantis's underwater sex dungeon.
Stonehenge, which is just leftover alien scaffolding.
The government agent assigned to my nudes.
Big Physics.
The black helicopter idling outside my ex's house.
The gas station bathroom where the deep state actually meets.
Antarctica's ice wall, and the bouncer who guards it.
The second law of thermodynamics, a deep-state psyop.
A numbers station that just reads my texts out loud.
The Freemasons' secret handshake, which is mostly heavy petting.
A blurry photo of Bigfoot's dick.
The alien autopsy that turned into a fourth date.
The simulation's terms of service.
A time traveler who only comes back to warn us about brunch.
The clone of me that handles the family group chat.
The elites' secret bunker with a strict no-pants policy.
A perpetual motion machine that runs on spite.
The Illuminati recruiter sliding into my DMs.
Project Blue Balls.
The FBI agent behind my webcam, who has seen too much.
The pyramids' true purpose: divorced-guy storage.
The patent office's secret basement of confiscated free-energy machines.
Big Tech harvesting my moans for the algorithm.
Crisis actors reenacting my last relationship.
Crop circles that are just aliens negging us.
The lizard person I matched with on purpose.

black.text: Wake up, sheeple! The government doesn't want you to know about _.
The moon landing was faked in a basement to cover up _.
Area 51 has finally opened its doors to the public, revealing _.
According to my podcast, the real reason birds sit on power lines is _.
The Illuminati secretly controls the banks, the media, and _.
My uncle is banned from Thanksgiving for explaining that _ is an inside job.
They're putting _ in the water supply. That's why everyone's like this.
My tinfoil hat protects me from mind control, 5G, and _.
Deep beneath the Denver Airport, the elites are hiding _.
Big Pharma doesn't want you to know that _ cures everything.
This just in: the crop circles outside town spell out "_."
The real reason the dinosaurs went extinct: _.
Bigfoot has stayed hidden for 400 years to avoid _.
Before probing me, the aliens made me sign a waiver about _.
The Men in Black flashed that little memory-wiper at me, and now all I remember is _.
Oh sure, the Earth is "round." Then explain _.
Big Physics will do anything to stop my perpetual motion machine, which runs on _.
Leaked documents confirm the government keeps a 200-page file on _.
I did my own research, and it turns out _ causes _.
My red string corkboard proves that _ is connected to _.
